label: Data Analysis
title: Exoplanet Transit Detection Pipeline
body: End-to-end photometric pipeline processing Kepler lightcurve data. Implements BLS algorithm for period finding with false-positive suppression.

label: Simulation
title: Cellular Automata for Pattern Formation
body: Reaction-diffusion systems simulated via GPU-accelerated finite difference methods. Reproduces Turing instability and spatial pattern emergence.

label: Automation
title: Research Paper Digest System
body: Automated arXiv monitoring and summarisation pipeline with topic clustering. Delivers daily briefings filtered by keyword relevance and citation network.

label: Visualisation
title: Interactive Phase Space Explorer
body: Browser-based tool for visualising dynamical systems and strange attractors. Real-time parameter control with WebGL rendering for responsive 3D trajectories.

label: Scientific Computing
title: Spectral Methods PDE Solver
body: Pseudospectral solver for nonlinear PDEs using FFT-based differentiation. Benchmarked against finite-element approaches with 10× speedup for smooth solutions.

label: Open Source
title: physutils — Python Toolkit
body: Utility library for common physics calculations: unit conversions, constants, dimensional analysis, and error propagation. 200+ GitHub stars.
